targets.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('hour', fetched_at) AS time, count(*) AS raw_documents
FROM raw_documents
WHERE fetched_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT source_id, status, count(*) AS runs, max(started_at) AS latest_run_at
FROM source_runs
WHERE started_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY source_id, status
ORDER BY latest_run_at DESC;

SELECT
  source_id,
  sum(documents_created) AS documents_created,
  sum(documents_unchanged) AS documents_unchanged,
  sum(error_count) AS errors
FROM source_runs
WHERE started_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY source_id
ORDER BY documents_created DESC;

SELECT rd.source_id, count(DISTINCT rd.id) AS unparsed_raw_documents
FROM raw_documents rd
LEFT JOIN document_chunks dc ON dc.raw_document_id = rd.id
WHERE dc.id IS NULL
GROUP BY rd.source_id
ORDER BY unparsed_raw_documents DESC;
